title: Camps. Castles. Carriages.
description: Add more medieval-fairy-tale style structures to your vanilla world!
body:
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/9fcd15843de57ddc05de0d627cc78d650a780175.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/9fcd15843de57ddc05de0d627cc78d650a780175.png)
**This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, play it in the modpack to gain the best experience!**
---

Feel that the overworld is too lonely? Try this out.
This mod add many fairy-tale style structures to your world.

### 1️⃣Castle of the Undead
A lost castle occupied by the undead army! You can take them down and take the castle back.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/0a69a291bc7b917172d283ba31cac7bda8332d93.jpeg)

But watch out, there is a boss guarding in the hall.
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/2052ba819a3a9ea2dcca5a407ed5e417522fd27d.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/2052ba819a3a9ea2dcca5a407ed5e417522fd27d.png)
**View more details in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/datapack/camps_castles_carriages/gallery).**
---
### 2️⃣Wandering Trader's Camp
Those traders always come out of nowhere? Well, now they have shelters!

### Sometimes their llamas will get lost. If you help to find it, they will pay you!
### 
### But be careful,sometimes the illusioners will disguise as traders, waiting for you!

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/3886b0c9ce1381253a6ddb1c74d981c43dce0c2f.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/3886b0c9ce1381253a6ddb1c74d981c43dce0c2f.png)
---
### 3️⃣Pillagers' Camp
These villains ain‘t always on patrol.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/d8000a1de03ca4aac9cf3bf2ef10f95d0f825a6c.jpeg)
---
### 4️⃣Pillagers' Broken Carriage
Why so hurry? Now they are trapped on the plains, with bunches of loots! But careful, they are still dangerous.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/88e33d27a836bc1b40febeff522e56227e2b2783.png)
---
### 5️⃣Witch's Wagon
Where do witches make their potions when they are so far away from their huts in the swamp?

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/6abaa3187c41fd935aebb71c96ff8aaf0bfa5e1a.jpeg)
---
### 6️⃣Piglins' Camp
I mean, piglins are apparently civilized creatures, right? They can't be hanging around in the crimson forest forever.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/806998fa93ca5406465b74d6991d23325c81080f.jpeg)

There's more than that! Now you will find a new mini boss during your trip in the Nether. Be careful! It shoots firework rocket that can track the target.
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/4803db0b1dbba69e2132d92fd2767ce2138f7cef.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/4803db0b1dbba69e2132d92fd2767ce2138f7cef.png)

---
### 7️⃣The Red Roof Castle
Back in the old times, Humans and villagers lived together. But now there are only villagers remain in the red roofs.

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/d72933c7cff471974e194c2caab0e45402db21b4.jpeg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/d72933c7cff471974e194c2caab0e45402db21b4.jpeg)

### 8️⃣The Ruined Drum Tower
A mysterious ancient drum tower, ruined by foreign invaders. Would you choose to fix it, or will you just take the treasure left there away?
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/39dd660044dee9af3cc968f493842208da61d9e0.jpeg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/39dd660044dee9af3cc968f493842208da61d9e0.jpeg)

### 9️⃣Pillagers' Prison Van
So that's how they get iron golems in their outpost?
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/79345f405d11dcfbbb42799d62c579aa8e6df1a9.jpeg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h9XxzZxe/images/79345f405d11dcfbbb42799d62c579aa8e6df1a9.jpeg)

**There is surely more content to come!**
